candidates.why: This appears to be a component feeding into the selected total row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', not a separate same-level operating line to add on top of that already selected COGS bucket.

Label indicates COGS-related D&A, but the preview shows it as a bucket-specific component line rather than a separate add-on outside the selected 'Cost of revenues/COGS' total. It should not be added separately absent values or evidence it sits outside the total.
This is a broader operating depreciation line and not specifically tied to the selected COGS bucket. It should not be mapped to COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is '[Income Statement] Cost of revenues/COGS'. The visible COGS-specific depreciation line appears to be a sub-component within that total, so adding it separately would risk double counting.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating depreciation line at the same level as other overhead rows and was explicitly excluded from the earlier XSGA component selection. Relative to the selected XSGA bucket ('Other external costs' + 'Staff costs' + 'Share-Based Compensation'), it appears outside those rows and should be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is SG&A-specific D&A, but it looks like a more granular component available only for one period. Because a broader 'Depreciation' row is present, prefer the broader summary-style line to avoid fragmentation/double counting.

This would be a direct SG&A D&A candidate if populated, but the preview shows no values and it appears to be a bucket-specific component label rather than the best row to select when 'Depreciation' already exists as the operative line.

variables.notes: OK. Selected XSGA reference bucket contains only 'Other external costs', 'Staff costs', and 'Share-Based Compensation'; no R&D row was selected and XRD is empty. The separate operating 'Depreciation' line appears outside those selected rows and is the best single D&A row to add later for XSGA-related operating overhead.
